posts.cooked: Hi I was wondering if I could use the Diver with the vidiot? Thanks

posts.name: Chad @ LZX Industries
posts.cooked: Greetings. Diver would be a really fun module to use with Vidiot. You could use it as a ramp generator to make Vidiot’s patterns more complicated. Or use it as a way to visualize audio signals through Vidiot. Have you watched the Diver demo video? You can pretend that Johnny is using Vidiot instead of Prismatic Ray and Visual Cortex. The results with Vidiot would be very similar to what he comes up with in the video.
